creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
El domingo 02 de diciembre a las 20:50:08 CET, Edwin Groothuis escribió:
> Maintainer of editors/xmlcopyeditor,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/174062 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174062

Hi,

I have applied the patch with no problem, and the software works as
expected. Please commit.

Best regards
